title: pilosella fastigiata
intro: Pilosella fastigiata, also known as a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe, is a type of alpine plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Pilosella fastigiata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Pilosella fastigiata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
